heading.en: Things are nouns — add -s for plural

body.en: Name things with nouns. Put a or the before them. Make most plurals by adding -s (dog -> dogs). With 600 thing words plus a/the and -s, you can name the world.
body.zh: 用名词指称事物，前面加 a 或 the。大多数复数加 -s（dog→dogs）。用 600 个“事物”词，加上 a/the 和 -s，就能命名整个世界。

gloss.en: the joint in the middle of the leg

words.example: She fell and hurt her knee.

gloss.en: a sharp tool used for cutting

words.example: I cut the bread with a knife.

gloss.en: a tie made in rope or string

words.example: He tied a knot in the rope.

gloss.en: a flat green part of a plant

words.example: A green leaf fell from the tree.

gloss.en: a part of the body used to walk

words.example: He broke his leg in the game.

gloss.en: a place with many books to read or borrow

words.example: I read books at the library.

gloss.en: a long thin mark

words.example: Draw a straight line on the page.

gloss.en: one of the soft edges of the mouth

words.example: She bit her lip and said nothing.

gloss.en: a device that keeps a door shut

words.example: She put a key in the lock.

gloss.en: a drawing of an area showing places

words.example: We used a map to find the town.

gloss.en: a game where teams play against each other

words.example: We watched a football match.

gloss.en: an animal with a long tail that climbs trees

words.example: The monkey sat in the tall tree.

gloss.en: the round object that shines in the sky at night

words.example: The moon is bright tonight.

gloss.en: the part of the face used to eat and speak

words.example: She opened her mouth to speak.

gloss.en: a body part that helps you move

words.example: He has strong arm muscles.

gloss.en: the hard part at the tip of a finger or toe

words.example: Stop biting your nails!

gloss.en: the part of the body between head and shoulders

words.example: He put a scarf around his neck.

gloss.en: a thin sharp tool used for sewing

words.example: She used a needle and thread.

gloss.en: a fibre that carries feelings to the brain

words.example: The pain hurt a nerve in his arm.

gloss.en: material with holes, used to catch things

words.example: They caught fish with a net.

gloss.en: the part of the face used to breathe and smell

words.example: She has a long, thin nose.

gloss.en: a small hard fruit with a hard shell

words.example: He cracked the nut to open it.

gloss.en: a room where people work at desks

words.example: She works in a small office.

gloss.en: a round juicy fruit with a thick skin

words.example: I ate an orange for lunch.

gloss.en: a box where food is cooked or heated

words.example: Take the cake out of the oven.

gloss.en: a thing wrapped in paper to be sent

words.example: A parcel came in the mail today.

gloss.en: a tool used for writing with ink

words.example: She wrote her name with a pen.

gloss.en: a wooden tool used for writing or drawing

words.example: I'll get a pencil and paper.

gloss.en: a painting, drawing or photo of something

words.example: He drew a picture of his dog.

gloss.en: a farm animal with pink skin and a curly tail

words.example: The pig rolled in the mud.

gloss.en: a short thin piece of wire with a sharp point

words.example: She used a pin to hold the cloth.

gloss.en: a tube that water or gas flows through

words.example: Water came out of the pipe.

gloss.en: a flying vehicle with wings

words.example: The plane flew high in the sky.

gloss.en: a flat round dish for food

words.example: She put the food on a plate.

gloss.en: a farm tool that turns over the soil

words.example: The farmer pulled the plough through the field.

gloss.en: a small bag in clothes to carry things

words.example: He put the key in his pocket.

gloss.en: a deep round container used for cooking

words.example: She boiled water in a pot.

gloss.en: a round vegetable that grows underground

words.example: Will you peel the potatoes for me?

gloss.en: a place where people are kept as punishment

words.example: The man went to prison for the crime.

gloss.en: a machine that forces liquid or air through

words.example: He used a pump to fill the tyre.

gloss.en: a bar used as a barrier or support

words.example: She held the rail on the stairs.

gloss.en: a small animal like a big mouse

words.example: A rat ran across the floor.

gloss.en: a paper that shows you have paid

words.example: Can I have a receipt, please?

gloss.en: a round band worn on the finger

words.example: She wears a gold ring.

gloss.en: a long straight thin bar

words.example: He fished with a long rod.

gloss.en: the part that covers the top of a building

words.example: There are birds on the roof.

gloss.en: the part of a plant that grows underground

words.example: The tree has deep roots.

gloss.en: a large cloth that catches wind to move a boat

words.example: The wind filled the boat's sail.

gloss.en: a place where children go to learn

words.example: My brother and I go to the same school.

gloss.en: a tool with two blades used to cut

words.example: She cut the paper with scissors.

gloss.en: a metal pin with a spiral, turned to fasten things

words.example: One of the screws is loose.

gloss.en: the small part of a plant a new plant grows from

words.example: She planted a seed in the soil.

gloss.en: a farm animal with a thick wool coat

words.example: The sheep eat grass in the field.

gloss.en: a flat board on a wall to put things on

words.example: The books are on the top shelf.

gloss.en: a large boat that carries people or goods by sea

words.example: The ship sailed across the sea.

gloss.en: a piece of clothing for the upper body

words.example: He wore a clean white shirt.

gloss.en: something you wear on your foot

words.example: I bought a new pair of shoes.

gloss.en: the layer that covers the body

words.example: The sun is bad for your skin.

gloss.en: a piece of clothing that hangs from the waist

words.example: She wore a long blue skirt.

gloss.en: a long thin animal with no legs

words.example: A snake moved through the grass.

gloss.en: clothing worn on the foot inside a shoe

words.example: He put on a clean pair of socks.

gloss.en: a tool with a flat blade used for digging

words.example: He dug the hole with a spade.

gloss.en: a soft thing that soaks up water for cleaning

words.example: She cleaned the table with a sponge.

gloss.en: a tool with a small bowl used to eat food

words.example: He ate the soup with a spoon.

gloss.en: the season after winter when plants grow

words.example: Flowers grow in the spring.

gloss.en: a shape with four equal straight sides

words.example: He drew a square on the page.

gloss.en: a small paper you stick on a letter to send it

words.example: She put a stamp on the letter.

gloss.en: a point of light seen in the sky at night

words.example: The stars were shining in the sky.

gloss.en: a place where trains stop

words.example: We waited for the train at the station.

gloss.en: the long thin part of a plant that holds leaves

words.example: The flower has a long green stem.

gloss.en: a thin piece of wood from a tree

words.example: We picked up sticks to start a fire.

gloss.en: a thin piece of clothing covering the leg

words.example: She wore a pair of stockings.

gloss.en: the part of the body where food goes

words.example: My stomach hurts after eating.

gloss.en: a shop that sells many kinds of goods

words.example: She bought a coat at the store.

gloss.en: a road in a town with houses on it

words.example: I was walking along the street.

gloss.en: the bright star that gives the earth light and heat

words.example: The sun was shining all day.

gloss.en: furniture with a flat top and legs

words.example: We sat at a round table.

gloss.en: the part at the back of an animal's body

words.example: The dog ran up, wagging its tail.

gloss.en: a thin string of cotton used for sewing

words.example: She used a needle and thread.

gloss.en: the passage in the neck for food and air

words.example: I have a sore throat today.

gloss.en: the short thick finger on the hand

words.example: The baby sucks her thumb.

gloss.en: a paper that lets you travel or go in

words.example: I bought a train ticket.

gloss.en: one of the small parts at the end of the foot

words.example: He hurt his big toe.

gloss.en: the soft part in the mouth used to taste and speak

words.example: She burned her tongue on the soup.

gloss.en: one of the hard white parts used to bite food

words.example: The child lost a tooth.

gloss.en: a place with houses and shops where people live

words.example: The nearest town is ten miles away.

gloss.en: a line of cars pulled along a track by an engine

words.example: We got on the train to the city.

gloss.en: a flat board used to carry food or drinks

words.example: She carried the cups on a tray.

gloss.en: a tall plant with a trunk and branches

words.example: There is an apple tree in the garden.

gloss.en: clothing covering the legs and lower body

words.example: He wore a pair of grey trousers.

gloss.en: a thing you hold to keep off rain or sun

words.example: She held an umbrella in the rain.

gloss.en: a solid side of a building or around an area

words.example: They put a picture on the wall.

gloss.en: a small clock you wear on your wrist

words.example: He looked at his watch.

gloss.en: a round part under a car that turns to move it

words.example: The front wheel of the bike is flat.

gloss.en: a long thin tool used to hit and drive animals

words.example: The rider held a whip in his hand.

gloss.en: a small thing you blow to make a sharp sound

words.example: The man blew his whistle loudly.

gloss.en: a glass opening in a wall to let in light

words.example: She looked out of the window.

gloss.en: the part a bird or plane uses to fly

words.example: The bird flapped its wings.

gloss.en: metal in the form of a thin thread

words.example: He cut the copper wire.

gloss.en: a long thin soft animal with no legs

words.example: Birds look for worms in the ground.
